title: Killer Karaoke Night at Fun Dungeon — March 13
summary: Fun Dungeon hosts 21+ Killer Karaoke on March 13 at 8 PM with happy hour, arcade games, pool, and pinball.
description:
Fun Dungeon — Phoenixville's brewcade and billiards spot — hosts Killer Karaoke on Friday, March 13 starting at 8 PM. Happy hour runs from 5 to 7 PM with half-priced drafts. The $15 admission includes unlimited arcade games, pinball, pool, darts, and console lounges.

Phoenixville's nightlife keeps getting better. If you're heading out for a fun Friday, great — and if you've got a parent or older relative living in one of Bridge Street's historic homes, it's worth checking that their bathroom is safe for when they're home alone.

title: Phoenixville Chamber Annual Awards Dinner — March 18
summary: The Phoenixville Regional Chamber of Commerce celebrates community leaders at its 2026 Annual Awards Dinner on March 18 at 5:30 PM.
description:
The Phoenixville Regional Chamber of Commerce hosts its 2026 Annual Awards Dinner on Wednesday, March 18 at 5:30 PM. The event celebrates local business owners and community leaders who've made Phoenixville the thriving borough it is today.

Phoenixville has transformed over the past decade — from the revitalized downtown to the growing restaurant scene along Bridge Street. What hasn't changed is the housing stock. Many of Phoenixville's most charming homes were built in the early 1900s, with bathrooms that don't include basic safety features like grab bars.

title: Yoga at Phoenixville Recreation Center — Ongoing in March
summary: The Phoenixville Rec Center offers yoga classes throughout March — mornings with Janine, evenings with Sheila.
description:
The Phoenixville Recreation Center runs yoga classes throughout March. Yoga with Janine meets Monday mornings from 9:30 to 10:30 AM, and Yoga with Sheila runs Tuesday evenings from 6 to 7 PM.

Yoga is one of the best things you can do for balance and flexibility — both of which reduce fall risk at home. But even the most dedicated yoga practitioner needs a grab bar when the shower floor is wet. Balance practice and bathroom safety equipment work together.
